case_title: AGUIAR, ALEXANDER vs. MACCO, PEDRO et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MACCO, PEDRO MACCO, MERCEDES

DEMAND FOR JURY ON MEMO SETTING FILED BY PLAINTIFF AGUIAR, ALEXANDER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-24-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-30-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

JUDGE JAMES MCKECHNIE MICHAEL KECK ATTY FOR PLAINTIFF MERCEDES MACCO IN PROPER 3:00 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFT PEDRO MACCO. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF & AGAINST DEFTS FOR POSS- OF THE PREMISES, DEFTS TO SURRENDER PREMISES BY 9/15/93 IF DEFTS CANNOT FIND NEW HOUSING, DEFTS TO NOTIFY PLTF. PLTF. IN WRITING & PAY PLTF. $400 BY 9/15/93 WHICH IS RENT FROM 9/15/93 50 9/30/93. IF PAID, WRIT MAY ISSUE ON 9/15/93 BUT EXECUTION STAYED TO 9/30/93. IF NOT PAID, WRIT OF POSS WILL ISSUE. PLTF. WAIVES RENTS/DAMAGES, ATTYS FEES & COSTS. MS. MACCO SAID SHE IS AUTHORIZED BY HER HUSBAND FOR THIS SETTLEMENT. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACCO, PEDRO MACCO, MERCEDES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1206 ALEMANY BOULEVARD, SF CA 94112, STAYED UNTIL SEP-30-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION OF WRIT STAYED TO 9/30/93 BY DEFTS PAYMENT TO PLTF. THE SUM OF $400 BY 9/15/93.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 08
